About Me
Lucas Seewald · Marketing Manager

Full-funnel strategy meets creative impact.

I'm a Marketing Manager with a track record built across some of Europe's most exciting brands — from managing OneFootball's influencer campaigns across the DACH market, to building Signpost Six's entire B2B marketing and sales engine from the ground up.

My work spans the full funnel: thought-leadership reports that generate qualified pipelines, influencer partnerships that drive millions of impressions, and content strategies that turn audiences into customers. I bring equal obsession to a 60-second reel and a 60-page whitepaper.

Signpost Six
